title: Cliffs and Coves
description: This is an add-on for William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld which makes coastlines more interesting, creating nice flat beached coves and rugged rocky escarpments.
body:
# Purpose
This datapack is an add-on for William Wythers' Overhauled Overworld which uses features to create eroded coastal cliffs and flat beaches, making coastlines more varried and realistic. 
## Warning
Unfortunately, due to the way minecraft structures generate, where villages intersect with the coast, some structures and roads can generate as if they are floating.
